title: euphorbia geminata
intro: Euphorbia geminata, also known as the twin-leaf spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia geminata are numerous and include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia geminata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's latex to create a topical ointment.
